message:
refactor(observability): rename ledger validation method and add zero-capacity guard

Rename validate_entry_size() to validate_append() for semantic clarity,
reflecting that the method now validates more than just size. Add
ZeroEntryCapacity error variant so ledgers configured with zero max entries
are rejected early with a LEDGER_CAPACITY_WARN stderr event, rather than
silently accepting and then failing on first append.

- Add ZeroEntryCapacity error variant to LedgerError
- Rename validate_entry_size → validate_append
- Add zero-capacity check with stderr warning event code LEDGER_CAPACITY_WARN
- Add test zero_entry_capacity_rejects_append proving rejection behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
